summary: Poor experience due to apparent setlist/file mismatch and unknown recording source
review: The sole reviewer expressed frustration that the tracks do not appear to match the expected setlist, casting doubt on the reliability of this release. No comments were made about audio fidelity or performance quality, leaving the technical and musical aspects unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief 2‑star review focusing on setlist mismatch; no positive information to offset the negative sentiment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio comments; dissatisfaction stems from perceived file/setlist errors rather than sound quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer suggests the tracks may be mislabeled or out of order, indicating possible setlist confusion.
